item.title: Addressing Heterogeneity in Federated Learning: Challenges and Solutions for a Shared Production Environment
item.description: Citation: T. Legler, V. Hegiste, A. Anwar, M. Ruskowski. “Addressing Heterogeneity in Federated Learning: Challenges and Solutions for a Shared Production Environment.” In: Procedia Computer Science, Vol. 253, 6th International Conference on Industry 4.0 and Smart Manufacturing. Elsevier, 2025, pp. 2831–2840.
